com.ubx.usdk.rfid

Class RfidManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ubx.usdk.USDKBaseManager
      • com.ubx.usdk.rfid.RfidManager
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ServiceConnection, USDKManager.StatusListener

    public class RfidManager
extends USDKBaseManager
implements USDKManager.StatusListener
    Description Control RFID module

      • RfidManager

        public RfidManager(android.content.Context context)

    • Method Detail

      • blockWriteTag

        public int blockWriteTag(byte btReadId,
                         byte[] btAryPassWord,
                         byte btMemBank,
                         byte btWordAdd,
                         byte btWordCnt,
                         byte[] btAryData)
        Block Write Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btAryPassWord - Access password, 4 bytes.
        btMemBank - Tag memory bank(0x00:RESERVED, 0x01:EPC, 0x02:TID, 0x03:USER)
        btWordAdd - Write start address,WORD(16 bits). When write EPC area, notice that EPC starts from address 02, the first two 2 words are for PC+CRC.
        btWordCnt - WORD(16 bits), please see the tag's spec for more information.
        btAryData - Write data, btWordCnt*2 bytes.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • cancelAccessEpcMatch

        public int cancelAccessEpcMatch(byte btReadId)
        clear EPC match.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • clearTagMask

        public int clearTagMask(byte btReadId,
                        byte btMaskNo)
        clear TAG mask setting.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btMaskNo - The mask No include(0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03,0x04),you clear any mask via the mask No.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • connect

        public boolean connect(java.lang.String port,
                       int baud,
                       java.lang.String module)
        connect Module
        Parameters:
        port - serial port
        baud - baud
        module - module name
        Returns:
        connect status

      • connectCom

        public boolean connectCom(java.lang.String port,
                          int baud)
        connect rfid module
        Parameters:
        port - port
        baud - Baud rate
        Returns:
        true: success, false: failed

      • customizedSessionTargetInventory

        public int customizedSessionTargetInventory(byte btReadId,
                                            byte btSession,
                                            byte btTarget,
                                            byte btRepeat)
        User define session and target inventory.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btSession - Desired session ID.
        btTarget - Desired Inventoried Flag(0x00:A, 0x01:B).
        btRepeat - Number of times of repeating this inventory.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • inventory

        public int inventory(byte btReadId,
                     byte btRepeat)
        iventory Tag. When reader gets this command, the inventory for EPC GEN2 tags starts, tag data will be stored in the internal buffer. Attention: When sets Repeat parameter to 255(0xFF), the anti-collision algorithm is optimized for applications with small tag quantity, which provide better efficiency and less response time.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btRepeat - success: 0, failed: -1.
        Returns:
        operate status

      • isConnected

        public boolean isConnected()
        get rfid module state.
        Returns:
        connected:true, disconnect:failed

        Inventory 18000-6B Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

                             byte[] btAryUID,
                             byte btWordAdd)
        Lock 18000-6B Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btAryUID - Operated Tag's UID, 8 bytes
        btWordAdd - Locked address
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

        public int iso180006BQueryLockTag(byte btReadId,
                                  byte[] btAryUID,
                                  byte btWordAdd)

        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btAryUID - Operated Tag's UID, 8 bytes
        btWordAdd - Locked address
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • iso180006BReadTag

        public int iso180006BReadTag(byte btReadId,
                             byte[] btAryUID,
                             byte btWordAdd,
                             byte btWordCnt)
        Read 18000-6B Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address)
        btAryUID - Operated Tag's UID, 8 bytes
        btWordAdd - Read data first address
        btWordCnt - Read data length
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • iso180006BWriteTag

        public int iso180006BWriteTag(byte btReadId,
                              byte[] btAryUID,
                              byte btWordAdd,
                              byte btWordCnt,
                              byte[] btAryBuffer)
        Write 18000-6B Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address)
        btAryUID - Operated Tag's UID, 8 bytes
        btWordAdd - Write data first address
        btWordCnt - Write data length
        btAryBuffer - Write data
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • killTag

        public int killTag(byte btReadId,
                   byte[] btAryPassWord)
        Kill Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address)
        btAryPassWord - Kill password,4 bytes
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • lockTag

        public int lockTag(byte btReadId,
                   byte[] btAryPassWord,
                   byte btMemBank,
                   byte btLockType)
        Lock Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address)
        btAryPassWord - Access password, 4 bytes.
        btMemBank - Tag memory bank(0x01:User Memory, 0x02:TID Memory, 0x03:EPC Memory, 0x04:Access Password, 0x05:Kill Password)
        btLockType - Lock operation type(0x00:Open, 0x01:Lock, 0x02:Permanent open, 0x03:Permanent lock)
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • onStatus

        public void onStatus(USDKManager.FEATURE_TYPE featureType,
                     USDKManager.STATUS status)
        Specified by:
        onStatus in interface USDKManager.StatusListener

      • readTag

        public int readTag(byte btReadId,
                   byte btMemBank,
                   byte btWordAdd,
                   byte btWordCnt,
                   byte[] btAryPassWord)
        Read Tag. Attention: If two tags have the same EPC, but different read data, then these two tags are considered different tags.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btMemBank - Tag memory bank(0x00:RESERVED, 0x01:EPC, 0x02:TID, 0x03:USER).
        btWordAdd - Read start address,please see the tag's spec for more information.
        btWordCnt - Read data length,Data length in WORD(16bits) unit. Please see the tag's spec for more information.
        btAryPassWord - Access password,4 bytes.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • realTimeInventory

        public int realTimeInventory(byte btReadId,
                             byte btRepeat)
        Inventory Tag(Read Time Mode). Attention: The hardware has a dual CPU architecture, main CPU is responsible for tag inventory, and assistant CPU is responsible for data management. Inventory and data transfer are parallel and simultaneous. So the data transfer via serial port doesn't affect the efficiency of reader.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btRepeat - Repeat time of inventory round. When Repeat = 255, The inventory duration is minimized. For example, if the RF field only has one or two tags, the inventory duration could be only 30-50 mS, this function provides a possibility for fast antenna switch applications on multi-ant devices.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • registerCallback

        public void registerCallback(com.ubx.usdk.rfid.aidl.IRfidCallback cb)
        Register CallBack(tag data or notify will be callback in the registered callback)
        Parameters:
        cb - callBack

      • release

        release source
        Overrides:
        release in class USDKBaseManager

      • reset

        public int reset(byte btReadId)
        Reset the specified address reader.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • resetInventoryBuffer

        public int resetInventoryBuffer(byte btReadId)
        Clear buffer of tag data.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • sendCommand

        public int sendCommand(byte[] btCMDPackage)
        send command
        Parameters:
        btCMDPackage - command(Hex)
        Returns:
        send status

      • setAccessEpcMatch

        public int setAccessEpcMatch(byte btReadId,
                             byte btEpcLen,
                             byte[] btAryEpc)
        Set Access EPC match(EPC match is effective,until next refresh).
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btEpcLen - Length of EPC.
        btAryEpc - EPC, Length equals EpcLen.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setAntConnectionDetector

        public int setAntConnectionDetector(byte btReadId,
                                    byte btDetectorStatus)
        Set antenna connection detector status.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - eader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btDetectorStatus - status(0x00:close detector of antenna connection, other values:sensitivity of antenna connection detector(return loss of port),unit dB. The higher the value, the greater the impedance matching requirements for port
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setFrequencyRegion

        public int setFrequencyRegion(byte btReadId,
                              byte btRegion,
                              byte btStartRegion,
                              byte btEndRegion)
        Set frequency region(system default frequencies).
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btRegion - Spectrum regulation(0x01:FCC, 0x02:ETSI, 0x03:CHN).
        btStartRegion - Start frequency of the spectrum.
        btEndRegion - End frequency of the spectrum,Setup the range of the RF output spectrum. The rules are: 1,Start frequency and end frequency should be in the range of the specified regulation. 2,Start frequency should be equal or lower than end frequency. 3, End frequency equals start frequency means use single frequency point.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setImpinjFastTid

        public int setImpinjFastTid(byte btReadId,
                            boolean blnOpen,
                            boolean blnSave)
        Set Impinj Monza FastTID. Attention: This function is only affective for some of Impinj Monza tag types. This function improves the performance of identifying tag's TID. When this function takes effect, tag's TID will be included to tag's EPC, therefore, tag's EPC will be altered; the original data (PC + EPC) will be changed to altered PC + EPC + EPC's CRC + TID. If error occurred during identifying TID, only the original data (PC + EPC) will be sent. If you don't need this function, please turn it off, otherwise there will be unnecessary time consumption. This command doesn't store the status to internal flash. After reset or power on, the value stored in flash will be restored.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        blnOpen - Whether to open FastTID
        blnSave - Whether to store in FLASH
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setOutputPower

        public int setOutputPower(byte btReadId,
                          byte btOutputPower)
        Set output power(Method 1). This command consumes more than 100mS. If you want you change the output power frequently, please use Cmd_set_temporary_output_power command, which doesn't reduce the life of the internal flash memory.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btOutputPower - RF output power, DT50P、DT50U: range from 0 ~ 33(0x00 - 0x21), DT50K、DT50J、DT50D: range from 18 ~ 26(0x12 ~ 0x1A) the unit is dBm.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setReaderAddress

        public int setReaderAddress(byte btReadId,
                            byte btNewReadId)
        Set Reader Address.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btNewReadId - New Reader Address,value range0-254(0x00-0xFE)
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setReaderIdentifier

        public int setReaderIdentifier(byte btReadId,
                               byte[] btAryIdentifier)
        Set Reader Identifier. The identifier is stored in internal flash.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btAryIdentifier - Reader's identifier (12 bytes).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setRfLinkProfile

        public int setRfLinkProfile(byte btReadId,
                            byte btProfile)
        RF Link Setup. If this command succeeded, reader will be reset, and the profile configuration is stored in the internal flash.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btProfile - Communication rate(0xD0:Tari 25uS,FM0 40KHz, 0xD1:Tari 25uS,Miller 4 250KHz, 0xD2:Tari 25uS,Miller 4 300KHz, 0xD3:Tari 6.25uS,FM0 400KHz).
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setTagMask

        public int setTagMask(byte btReadId,
                      byte btMaskNo,
                      byte btTarget,
                      byte btAction,
                      byte btMembank,
                      byte btStartAdd,
                      byte btMaskLen,
                      byte[] maskValue)
        Set the mask filter the Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btMaskNo - The mask No include(0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03,0x04),you set different mask via the mask No.
        btTarget - Set the inventory way(s0,s1,s2 or s3),you must use you set target to inventory the tag.
        btAction - The match tag or not Action,you can see the detail of this command.
        btMembank - The select mask region,EPC,TID or USER.
        btStartAdd - The mask start address(according to bit).
        btMaskLen - The mask length (according to bit).
        maskValue - The mask value.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed: -1.

      • setTemporaryOutputPower

        public int setTemporaryOutputPower(byte btReadId,
                                   byte btRfPower)
        Set temporary output power. The output power value will Not be saved to the internal flash memory so that the output power will be restored from the internal flash memory after restart or power off.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btRfPower - RF output power, DT50P、DT50U: range from 0 ~ 33(0x00 - 0x21), DT50K、DT50J、DT50D: range from 18 ~ 26(0x12 ~ 0x1A) the unit is dBm.
        Returns:
        operate status

      • setTrigger

        public int setTrigger(boolean enable)
        Reader Trigger mode.
        Parameters:
        enable - enable to operate Reader.
        Returns:
        success: 0, failed:-1.

      • setUserDefineFrequency

        public int setUserDefineFrequency(byte btReadId,
                                  byte btFreqInterval,
                                  byte btChannelQuantity,
                                  int nStartFreq)
        Set frequency region(user defined frequencies).
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btFreqInterval - Frequency space, frequency space = FreqSpace x 10KHz.
        btChannelQuantity - Frequency Quantity, this quantity includes the start frequency, if set this byte to 1, it means use start frequency as the single carrier frequency . This byte should be larger than 0.
        nStartFreq - Start Frequency, the unit is KHz. Set the start frequency with hex format, for example, 915000KHz = 0D F6 38 KHz.
        Returns:
        operate status

      • stopInventory

        public int stopInventory()
        stop tag inventory
        Returns:
        status

      • unregisterCallback

        public void unregisterCallback(com.ubx.usdk.rfid.aidl.IRfidCallback cb)
        Unregister CallBack
        Parameters:
        cb - callBack

      • writeTag

        public int writeTag(byte btReadId,
                    byte[] btAryPassWord,
                    byte btMemBank,
                    byte btWordAdd,
                    byte btWordCnt,
                    byte[] btAryData)
        Write Tag.
        Parameters:
        btReadId - Reader Address(0xFF Public Address).
        btAryPassWord - Access password, 4 bytes.
        btMemBank - Tag memory bank(0x00:RESERVED, 0x01:EPC, 0x02:TID, 0x03:USER)
        btWordAdd - Write start address,WORD(16 bits). When write EPC area, notice that EPC starts from address 02, the first two 2 words are for PC+CRC.
        btWordCnt - WORD(16 bits), please see the tag's spec for more information.
        btAryData - Write data, btWordCnt*2 bytes.
        Returns:
        send status
